name: Ronny Jackson
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $307,005 for Ronny Jackson in U.S. House, TX-13. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
